/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbme_gazebo_sensors__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libbme_gazebo_sensors__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/bme_gazebo_sensors__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/bme_gazebo_sensors/action/detail/move_action__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
